name: multi-agent
summary: Umbrella pattern for any workflow using >1 agent. Specializations: parallelization, blackboard, orchestrator-workers, eval-optimizer.
when_to_use: When task benefits from specialists (security + performance + test), independent perspectives (debug council), or parallel execution (review board).

layers.CLAUDE.md: Add rule for when to escalate: 'For PR review, architectural decisions, or debugging with multiple candidate causes — use /cc-council.'
layers.skill: skills/agent-teams is the central skill. skills/agentic-patterns for pattern selection.

anti_patterns: Multi-agent for tasks solo would finish faster — coordination overhead wins.
No worktree isolation when agents write the same files.
No supervisor when there are >2 agents — each reports separately.
